creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: vmiszczak, it looks like you encountered several bugs that I've recently fixed.  The net route appeared in the wrong fib due to PR 187549.  Ping failed, in the first case, probably due to PR 167947.  Please retest using CURRENT, stable/10 greater than 267193, stable/9 greater than 271825, or 10.1-BETA1.
